idea-plugin.name: CertView X.509
idea-plugin.description:
Inspect X.509 certificates and Java keystores directly inside IntelliJ-based IDEs.

CertView X.509 keeps local certificate inspection close to Java, PKI, digital identity, signing, and secure backend work. Open certificate and keystore files from the Project view and review the metadata developers usually need before reaching for terminal commands.

Supported inputs include PEM, DER, CRT, CER, PKCS#12, JKS, and JCEKS files.

What it shows:
  • Inspect subject, issuer, serial number, and validity dates.
  • Open PEM, DER, CRT, and CER certificate files in a dedicated viewer.
  • Inspect PKCS#12, JKS, and JCEKS keystores with password prompts when required.
  • Keep supported local inputs inside the IDE instead of temporary OpenSSL or keytool dumps.

This is an inspection tool. It does not replace certificate path validation, revocation checks, WebPKI policy validation, or organizational PKI review.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Improved Marketplace-facing metadata for certificate and keystore workflows.
  • Documented supported formats and inspection scope more explicitly.
  • Added clearer positioning for local X.509, PKI, and secure backend use cases.
